final:
// // This module implements a linear voltage regulator that outputs 0V when EN is low, Vin when EN is high and Vin is below 5V, and 5V when EN is high and Vin is above 5V.
module voltage_regulator (
    input [4:0] Vin,
    input EN,
    output reg [4:0] Vout
);
    parameter THRESHOLD = 5; // 5V threshold

    always @(*) begin
        if (EN == 1'b0) begin
            Vout = 5'b00000; // Vout = 0V
        end else if (Vin < THRESHOLD) begin
            Vout = Vin; // Vout = Vin
        end else begin
            Vout = THRESHOLD; // Vout = 5V
        end
    end
endmodule
